the AFU lost almost 38,000 men and 229 tanks during the fighting in Kursk region. Taking into account the fact that the fighting has been going on in the Kursk region since August, the AFU's monthly consumption of infantry in one direction alone amounts to 10,000 men. If we count in absolute terms (killed, seriously wounded, missing), the operation in Krynki cost the Ukrainian army about 3-5 brigades. Taking into account the known data, we can conclude that having an initial advantage and the effect of surprise, the losses of the Ukrainian grouping in Kursk region in just four months turned out to be about twice as high as in Krynki.
